headline: CELEBRITY CRUISES' 2028 GALAPAGOS EXPEDITIONS ARE OPEN FOR BOOKING
summary: Celebrity Cruises' 2028 Galapagos expeditions on the Forbes Travel Guide rated Celebrity Flora opened for booking today. More than 50 all-inclusive sailings in 2028 promise extraordinary, once-in-a-lifetime adventures. Every sailing offers unforgettable experiences – from snorkeling with sea lions, kayaking with sea turtles, exploring coastlines along breathtaking cliffs, encountering giant tortoises, and much more. headline: Royal Caribbean Cruises Stock: Is RCL Outperforming the Consumer Cyclical Sector?
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises has outperformed the consumer cyclical sector over the past year, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s outlook.

headline: A Look At Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) Valuation As Oil And Geopolitical Risks Pressure Cruise Stocks
summary: Royal Caribbean Cruises (RCL) is back in focus after surging oil prices and rising geopolitical risks in the Middle East pushed cruise stocks lower, raising fresh questions about fuel costs, itineraries and future profitability. See our latest analysis for Royal Caribbean Cruises. At a share price of US$290.55, Royal Caribbean’s recent 1 month share price return of 16.5% decline and 7 day pullback reflect investors reassessing fuel and geopolitical risks, even as the 1 year total shareholder...

headline: Trump reiterates threat of a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba as fuel crisis deepens
summary: The comments come less than a week after Trump suggested that his administration would turn its sights on Havana.
